meaning: n.金莺类,白头翁科的小鸟
examples: And off he went to look for the oriole.
They often use oriole reagent in their experiments.
Small oriole eating the food looks very interesting.
Shields studied the best pickoff artists, zeroing in on the work of former Baltimore Oriole and Yankee pitcher Mike Mussina.
Some of the better-known settings include Boston's TD Garden, Oriole Park at Camden Yards in Baltimore, and London's Wembley and Emirates Stadiums.
